title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST: error discriminated by string-matching error message
description: The SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST handler in relay/src/ws.rs:2122 distinguishes 'too many pending invoices' from other DB errors by calling e.to_string().contains('too many pending invoices'). If the error message ever changes (rewording, anyhow context wrapping), the branch silently falls through to INTERNAL_ERROR and the client gets a misleading error. Fix: return a typed error (custom enum or sentinel anyhow error type) from count_and_create_invoice so the caller can match without inspecting the string.
